raw.message: Everyone thinks Match 3 is boring...until they try Jolly Match😀

hook.summary: A hand triggers a booster on a grid of rabbit tiles, causing a satisfying chain reaction that reveals colorful items.
hook.visual_action: A finger taps a purple booster, shattering rabbit-themed tiles to reveal gems and shells.

scene_flow: Hand taps a purple booster on a grid of rabbit-engraved tiles.
Tiles shatter in a satisfying animation, revealing colorful gems and items.
New items fall into the cleared spaces as the 'Jolly Match' logo remains centered.
The sequence loops, emphasizing the core matching and clearing mechanic.
audience_proxy: Casual puzzle gamers who enjoy satisfying tile-matching and collection mechanics.
